rulings.Case Title: DAVID SALMA et al VS. RUBEN DIEGO Q PICARDO et al (Pltfs Challenge Judge Quidachay)
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday December 3, 2014 line 1. DEFENDANT KATRINA RODRIGUEZ MONTINOLA'S MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT MOOT =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID SALMA et al VS. RUBEN DIEGO Q PICARDO et al (Pltfs Challenge Judge Quidachay)
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday December 3, 2014 line 1. DEFENDANT KATRINA RODRIGUEZ MONTINOLA'S DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege all elements of fraud (including but no limited to misrepresentation and reliance) against Montinola with requisite specificity and/or to allege facts giving rise to fraud liability for "participation in fraudulent short sale." =(501/req)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Cross Defendant Pure Entertainment Llc, A California Limited Demurrer To 1st Amended Cross Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday December 3, 2014 line 6. Cross Defendant Pure Entertainment LLC'S Demurrer To 1st Amended Cross Complaint SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained as to the 2nd cause of action to allege something more than breach of contract. Demurrer is sustained as to the fourth cause of action to state facts constituting outrageous behavior. Demurrer to the 3rd cause of action is overruled, issues of fact are not properly resolved on the demurrer; whether the e-mail as a whole is a reflection of business dispute with use of hyperbole is an issue of fact. Demurer to the 5th cause of action is sustained with leave to amend to allege proper grounds for ejectment. Demurer to he 6th cause of action is sustained with leave to amend to remove the request for declaration of right between Cood and Pure. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Cross Defendant Vlad Cood'S Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday December 3, 2014 line 6. Cross Defendant Vlad Cood's Demurrer To First Amended Cross-Complaint OVERRULED in part and SUSTAINED in part. Demurrer to the 3rd cause of action is overruled, issues of fact are not properly resolved on the demurrer; whether the e-mail as a whole is a reflection of business dispute with use of hyperbole is an issue of fact. Demurrer to the 1st, 2nd, 4th, 5th and 6th causes of action are sustained with final leave to amend to allege facts showing that Cood is a proper defendant. Demurrer to the 7th cause of action is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts giving rise to Cood's liability for interference with contractual relationship between Hom and Pure. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HEMLATA G VYAS VS. EDWARD BERMAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday December 3, 2014 line 2. DEFENDANT EDWARD BERMAN's and INTERSPACE, INC's. DEMURRERS TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED - with leave to amend to allege a cause of action for quiet title that is not barred by statute of limitations. Complaint fails to allege a cause of action for slander of title. Plaintiff cites no authority for the proposition that statute of limitations re-sets every day Defendant refuses to re-convey the title. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday December 3, 2014 line 3. PLAINTIFF TITO CARDONA'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED, no opposition filed. Counsel prepare order.=(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DFI FUNDING, INC VS. MARIA DE JESUS SOSA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday December 3, 2014 line 7. DEFENDANT MARIA DE JESUS SOSA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OFF CALENDAR, amended motion for summary judgment noticed for December 5, 2014.=(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE UNIVERSI VS. ONYINYECHUKWU UDEH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday December 3, 2014 line 4. DEFENDANT ONYINYECHUKWU UDEH'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Notice asserts 3 separate breaches of covenants. Demurrer only challenges the validity of two of the listed breaches/grounds and does not provide any argument and authority that breach of covenant to pay security fees is not valid grounds for unlawful detainer under CCP 1161(3). Notice and complaint are not uncertain. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE UNIVERSI VS. ONYINYECHUKWU UDEH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday December 3, 2014 line 4. DEFENDANT ONYINYECHUKWU UDEH'S MOTION TO STRIKE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, untimely per CRC 3.1322(b). =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GIUSEPPE MESSINA AND ROSALIE WARD SUCCESSOR VS. GRACE DONNER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Responses To Disco
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Tuesday December 3, 2014 line 5. PLAINTIFF GIUSEPPE MESSINA'S AND ROSALIE WARD'S Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery Responses GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall serve responses to Form Interrogatories-UD, Special Interrogatories, and Requests for Production, without objections within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $954. =(501/REQ)
